main_case_blueprint.setup_code:
h_plus = Compound('H+')
oh_minus = Compound('OH-')
na_plus = Compound('Na+')
reaction1 = Reaction([
    (h_plus, 2),
    (oh_minus, 1)
])
compound_charge = {
    'H+': 1.0,
    'OH-': -1.0,
    'Na+': 1.0
}
main_case_blueprint.call_code:
net_charge1 = reaction_charge(reaction1, compound_charge)
print(f"Net charge of reaction1: {net_charge1}")
reaction2 = Reaction([
    (na_plus, 1),
    (oh_minus, 1)
])
net_charge2 = reaction_charge(reaction2, compound_charge)
print(f"Net charge of reaction2: {net_charge2}")
result = {'net_charge1': net_charge1, 'net_charge2': net_charge2}
